subtitle.id: Bersama mitra terpercaya, kami membangun ekosistem bisnis yang kuat — dari distribusi, teknologi, hingga pelestarian lingkungan.
subtitle.en: Together with trusted partners, we build a strong business ecosystem — from distribution and technology to environmental conservation.

desc.id: Mitra pengembangan ekosistem bisnis hijau nasional.
desc.en: Partner in national green business ecosystem development.

desc.id: Kolaborasi ekspansi distribusi komoditas alam ke pasar ASEAN.
desc.en: Collaboration in expanding natural commodity distribution to ASEAN markets.

desc.id: Kemitraan investasi dan pengembangan kapasitas bisnis.
desc.en: Investment partnership and business capacity development.

desc.id: Mitra logistik pengiriman produk fashion ke seluruh Indonesia.
desc.en: Logistics partner for fashion product delivery across Indonesia.

desc.id: Solusi logistik pengiriman komoditas bahan baku alam ke seluruh Indonesia.
desc.en: Logistics solution for natural raw material commodity delivery across Indonesia.

desc.id: Jaringan distribusi produk ke wilayah 3T Indonesia.
desc.en: Product distribution network to remote 3T regions of Indonesia.

desc.id: Infrastruktur cloud untuk sistem manajemen distribusi BOBA Group.
desc.en: Cloud infrastructure for BOBA Group's distribution management system.

desc.id: Database solusi untuk manajemen data skala besar.
desc.en: Database solution for large-scale data management.

desc.id: Platform deployment untuk properti digital dan sistem perdagangan BOBA Group.
desc.en: Deployment platform for BOBA Group's digital properties and trading systems.

desc.id: Kemitraan pengelolaan sampah sesuai regulasi lingkungan hidup.
desc.en: Waste management partnership in accordance with environmental regulations.

desc.id: Kolaborasi program pelestarian lingkungan & ESG perusahaan.
desc.en: Collaboration on environmental conservation and corporate ESG programs.

desc.id: Riset bersama pengolahan sampah organik menjadi bioenergi.
desc.en: Joint research on converting organic waste into bioenergy.

desc.id: Kami percaya bahwa kemitraan yang baik adalah fondasi pertumbuhan bersama. Setiap mitra mendapatkan akses penuh ke ekosistem, data, dan dukungan tim PT BOBA.
desc.en: We believe that good partnerships are the foundation of mutual growth. Every partner gets full access to PT BOBA's ecosystem, data, and team support.

items.id: Akses ke ekosistem brand fashion & green tech PT BOBA
items.en: Access to PT BOBA's fashion brand & green tech ecosystem

items.id: Akses jaringan distribusi bahan baku alam BOBA Group (Nasional & ASEAN)
items.en: Access to BOBA Group's natural raw material distribution network (National & ASEAN)

items.id: Co-branding dan promosi lintas platform digital
Dukungan operasional & after-sales dari tim PT BOBA
items.en: Operational & after-sales support from PT BOBA's team

desc.id: Bergabung sebagai mitra logistik & distribusi produk fashion dan layanan green tech PT BOBA ke seluruh nusantara.
desc.en: Join as a logistics & distribution partner for PT BOBA's fashion products and green tech services across the archipelago.

desc.id: Kolaborasi pengembangan sistem manajemen distribusi, integrasi logistik, dan digitalisasi rantai pasok bahan baku alam.
desc.en: Collaborate on distribution management system development, logistics integration, and supply chain digitalization of natural raw materials.

desc.id: Bersama membangun solusi green technology — dari pengelolaan sampah hingga produksi bahan bakar bio.
desc.en: Together building green technology solutions — from waste management to biofuel production.

title.en: Ready to Partner with PT BOBA?

desc.id: Kirimkan proposal kemitraan Anda atau jadwalkan pertemuan dengan tim kami. Kami siap merespons dalam 1×24 jam.
desc.en: Send your partnership proposal or schedule a meeting with our team. We're ready to respond within 24 hours.
